ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "price" REAL /* Listing price of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" REAL /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "sqft_living" INTEGER /* Square footage of the living area */,
  "sqft_lot" INTEGER /* Square footage of the lot */,
  "floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the property */,
  "waterfront" INTEGER /* Is the property waterfront (1) or not (0) */,
  "view" INTEGER /* Is the property viewable (1) or not (0) */,
  "condition" INTEGER /* Condition of the property (1-5) */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade of the property (1-13) */,
  "sqft_above" INTEGER /* Square footage of the above-ground living area */,
  "sqft_basement" INTEGER /* Square footage of the basement */,
  "sqft_living15" INTEGER /* Square footage of the living area in 2015 */,
  "sqft_lot15" INTEGER /* Square footage of the lot in 2015 */,
  "house_age" INTEGER /* Age of the house */,
  "renovated" INTEGER /* Has the house been renovated (1) or not (0) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the property is located in */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the property is located in */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (residential, commercial, etc.) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "parking" TEXT /* Parking features of the property (garage, street, etc.) */,
  "hoa_fees" REAL /* Homeowners association fees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the property was sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price the property was sold for */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who sold the property */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (cash, financed, etc.) */,
  "closing_costs" REAL /* Closing costs for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the buyer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the buyer is located in */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the buyer is located in */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "office" TEXT /* Office location of the agent */,
  "brokerage" TEXT /* Brokerage the agent is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being listed */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent managing the listing */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the listing was created */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the listing expires */,
  "listing_price" REAL /* Price the property is listed for */,
  "listing_status" TEXT /* Status of the listing (active, pending, sold, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the client is located in */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the client is located in */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leads" (
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the lead belongs to */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent managing the lead */,
  "lead_date" TEXT /* Date the lead was created */,
  "lead_source" TEXT /* Source of the lead (online, referral, etc.) */,
  "lead_status" TEXT /* Status of the lead (new, contacted, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leads_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leads_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role is assigned to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_views" (
  "property_view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property view */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being viewed */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who viewed the property */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the property was viewed */,
  "view_type" TEXT /* Type of view (in-person, virtual, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the offer is for */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who made the offer */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date the offer was made */,
  "offer_price" REAL /* Price of the offer */,
  "offer_status" TEXT /* Status of the offer (accepted, rejected, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
